channel.title: GNfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #86: Easy Dinners for the Week Ahead
item.description: This week's meal plan offers a fresh set of straightforward dinner ideas designed to simplify weeknight cooking.

item.title: Baked Sweet Hawaiian Chicken with Extra Sauce
item.description: An updated take on a Hawaiian-inspired baked chicken dish, now featuring double the sauce in response to reader requests.

item.title: No-Bake Strawberry Cream Pie for Warm Weather
item.description: A no-bake strawberry cream pie that requires no oven time, making it a practical dessert option during warmer months.

item.title: Mexican Macaroni Salad: A Flavorful Twist on a Classic Side Dish
item.description: A creamy, tangy macaroni salad with Mexican-inspired ingredients that offers a flavorful variation on the traditional recipe.

item.title: Skirt Steak Marinade Recipe for Flavorful Results
item.description: A well-balanced skirt steak marinade that enhances flavor and is straightforward enough for home cooks to prepare with confidence.
